code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Guest as Guest (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault)
    participant Writer as Writer (HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)
    participant Editor as Editor (HealthTech_PatientRecords)
    participant Admin as Admin (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)
    participant CArticle as "Create Article"
    participant EArticle as "Edit Article"
    participant DArticle as "Delete Article"
    participant CComment as "Create Comment"
    participant CReply as "Create Reply"
    participant ManageRoles as "Manage User Roles"


    %% Admin actions
    Admin->>ManageRoles: Can manage user roles
    Admin->>CArticle: Can create article
    Admin->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Admin->>DArticle: Can delete any article
    Admin->>CComment: Can create comment
    Admin->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Editor actions
    Editor->>CArticle: Can create article
    Editor->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Editor->>CComment: Can create comment
    Editor->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Writer actions
    Writer->>CArticle: Can create article
    Writer->>EArticle: Can edit own article
    Writer->>CComment: Can create comment
    Writer->>CReply: Can create reply

    %% Guest actions
    Guest->>CComment: Can create comment
    Guest->>CReply: Can create reply
repo_description: Backend service for a collaborative multi-author blog platform built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Socket.io, featuring JWT authentication, dynamic role-based permissions, and real-time comments

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech系统画一个权限时序图，核心是四个角色：Guest、Writer、Editor和Admin。每个角色对应不同的后端服务，比如Admin对接EMR_Sync，Writer对接DiagnosticEngine。
明白，Guest对应HIPAA_Vault，Editor对应PatientRecords。那操作节点方面，我理解为文章管理（创建、编辑、删除）和互动功能（评论、回复），还有角色管理？
对，五个操作节点：Create Article、Edit Article、Delete Article、Create Comment、Create Reply，再加上Manage User Roles给Admin专用。权限要区分清楚——Admin能删任何文章，Writer只能删自己的。
好，我先画出参与者：Guest、Writer、Editor、Admin，以及六个操作节点。Admin到Manage User Roles画一条"Can manage user roles"，同时Admin可以执行全部五种内容操作。
Editor的权限要降一级：能创建、编辑任何文章，但不能删除。评论和回复功能保留。Writer只能编辑自己的文章，其他一样。
已添加Editor到Create Article、Edit Article、Create Comment、Create Reply的连接，标注"Can create article"等。Writer这边特别标注"Can edit own article"以区分权限范围。
Guest是最低权限，只能评论和回复，不能碰文章。确认一下：Guest到Create Article这些节点没有连线，只有到Create Comment和Create Reply？
确认完毕。Guest仅保留Create Comment和Create Reply两条连线，标注"Can create comment"和"Can create reply"。整个权限层级：Admin全权限，Editor缺删除，Writer缺删他人+编辑受限，Guest仅互动。
